summary: Iteration 89 - Operational Ownership and Assignment Tracking feature testing completed. All 22 backend pytest tests passed. Frontend verification via screenshot confirmed Operations Queue displays Owner column, assignment status badges (Assigned, In Progress, Waiting, Completed, Unassigned), summary cards (Unassigned: 119, In Progress: 1), owner filter input, assignment filter dropdown, and orange highlighting for unassigned high-priority rows. Backend enriches SO/PO detail endpoints with assignment fields.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/assignments - creates assignment with default status 'assigned'
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/assignments - upserts when entity already has active assignment
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/assignments - returns 422 for invalid entity_type
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/assignments - returns 404 for non-existent PO Draft
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/assignments - lists all assignments
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/assignments?entity_type=X&entity_id=Y - filters by entity
Backend: PATCH /api/inventory-ledger/assignments/{id} - updates assignment_status
Backend: PATCH /api/inventory-ledger/assignments/{id} - reassigns to different owner
Backend: PATCH /api/inventory-ledger/assignments/{id} - returns 404 for non-existent
Backend: PATCH /api/inventory-ledger/assignments/{id} - returns 422 for invalid status
Backend: Unassigned entities return current_owner=null, assignment_status='unassigned'
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/operations-queue - items include current_owner, assignment_status, assignment_updated_at
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/operations-queue - response includes unassigned_count, in_progress_count, waiting_count
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/operations-queue?assigned_to=X - filter by owner works
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/operations-queue?assignment_status=in_progress - filter works
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/operations-queue?unassigned_only=true - filter works
Backend: Priority score boost +10 for unassigned items with priority >= 40
Backend: Full assignment workflow (create -> in_progress -> waiting -> completed)
Backend: PO Draft detail endpoint includes current_owner, assignment_status, assignment_updated_at
Backend: SO endpoints have assignment enrichment code
Frontend: Operations Queue page loads with correct layout
Frontend: Summary cards show Unassigned (119) and In Progress (1) counts
Frontend: Assignment filter dropdown has all options (Unassigned, Assigned, In Progress, Waiting, Completed)
Frontend: Owner filter input field present
Frontend: Table has Owner and Status columns
Frontend: Rows show assignment status badges
Frontend: Orange highlighting styles present for unassigned high-priority rows
Frontend: Detail panel shows Owner and Assignment fields
Frontend: AssignmentSection component integrated in SO workflow and PO Draft detail views

Assignment counts at lines 3869-3871: unassigned_count, in_progress_count, waiting_count

seed_data_used.test_assignments: Multiple TEST- prefixed assignments created during testing

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 89 - Assignment feature fully tested. Backend endpoints: POST/GET/PATCH /api/inventory-ledger/assignments. GET /api/inventory-ledger/operations-queue now returns assignment fields (current_owner, assignment_status, assignment_updated_at) and counts (unassigned_count, in_progress_count, waiting_count). Priority score boosted +10 for unassigned items with priority >= 40. Frontend: Operations Queue page shows Owner and Status columns, summary cards with Unassigned/In Progress counts, assignment filter dropdown, owner filter input. AssignmentSection component in InventoryLedgerPage.js used in SO workflow and PO Draft detail. Assignment upsert logic: creating assignment for entity with active (non-completed) assignment updates existing rather than creating duplicate. Console hydration warning is cosmetic (span wrapping tr elements in debug mode).

create_assignment.upsert_behavior: Updates existing active assignment instead of creating duplicate

OperationsQueuePage.row_highlighting: Orange border-left for unassigned high-priority items

features: Status transition buttons (In Progress, Waiting, Completed)
